Operation 'getFlagTargeting' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description is too brief and lacks detail about what targeting information is returned. Added clarity about targeting rules, conditions, and rollout percentages to help AI agents understand the scope of data returned and when to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Get flag targeting for an environment
data.current_description: Retrieve targeting for a flag in an environment
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the complete targeting configuration for a specific flag in an environment, including all targeting rules, conditions, and rollout percentages. Returns the flag's targeting details that determine which users or entities receive the flag variant.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks detail about what targeting information is returned. Added clarity about targeting rules, conditions, and rollout percentages to help AI agents understand the scope of data returned and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'updateCompanyFlags' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about inputs (updateEntityFlagsBody structure), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (targeting changes affect flag variant delivery). Enhanced version clarifies the request body schema, the effect of the update on flag variant delivery, and the response content for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Update flag targeting for a company
data.current_description: Update specific targeting for flags for a company in an environment
data.description_suggestion: Update flag targeting configuration for a company in an environment. Accepts updateEntityFlagsBody containing flag keys and their new targeting rules. Modifies which flag variants the company receives based on updated targeting conditions. Returns the updated flags with their new targeting status.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs (updateEntityFlagsBody structure), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (targeting changes affect flag variant delivery). Enhanced version clarifies the request body schema, the effect of the update on flag variant delivery, and the response content for better AI agent understanding.
